name: @gordo-labs/react-native-iroh
description: Generic React Native TurboModule bridge for Iroh endpoints and framed streams
author: Gordo Labs

scripts.ubrn:android: node scripts/with-native-build-env.mjs --android ubrn build android --release --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-js.mjs
scripts.ubrn:ios: IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET=13.0 node scripts/with-native-build-env.mjs ubrn build ios --release --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && node scripts/patch-ubrn-ios.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-js.mjs
scripts.ubrn:generate: ubrn generate jsi turbo-module --config ubrn.config.yaml && node scripts/patch-ubrn-cmake.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-ios.mjs && node scripts/patch-ubrn-js.mjs
